candidates.why: Contains 'revenue' but is a small ancillary line under other operating income, not the main top-line.
Best match for core top-line revenue/sales.
Explicitly non-revenue, so not appropriate for REVT.

variables.notes: Selected the main top-line sales row.

candidates.why: Best available direct production/service cost line; resembles cost of materials/subcontracting and is the closest concept to COGS.

variables.notes: REVIEWED. Candidate list for COGS was empty. Chose 'Materials and general subcontract work' from the full preview as the closest direct cost / cost of sales line. Manual review flagged because this was selected outside the provided candidate list.

candidates.why: This is a direct cost line, more consistent with COGS than SG&A, so it should be excluded from XSGA.
Typical overhead/personnel cost component and a strong SG&A component candidate.
Typical operating overhead bucket and a strong SG&A component candidate.
Headcount metric, not an expense row.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A total row is present. Selected the best overhead component rows and excluded direct costs, D&A, and totals.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization of previously capitalized R&D is not current-period R&D expense and should be excluded.
Balance sheet asset row, not income statement R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset row, not current R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balance sheet balancing row, not current R&D expense.

variables.notes: No clear income statement R&D expense line is provided. Balance sheet R&D asset rows and amortization of capitalized R&D do not meet the XRD definition.

candidates.why: Broad finance-cost line; usable fallback if no cleaner interest-expense line is available.
Most direct and preferred interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Would be ideal if populated, but appears unpopulated in preview; still a valid priority fallback because labels present can have values in some years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Interest-related but narrower supplemental component, less preferred than the main interest expense row.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Priority list prefers the most specific reported interest expense line, then a generic net-interest label, then broad financial expenses as fallback.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to parent company shareholders
candidates.why: Best match because it represents parent/shareholder equity and excludes non-controlling interests.
Includes total equity and would risk double counting with MIB if used alongside NCI.
Balancing row, not preferred over explicit equity labels.
Balancing row, not preferred over explicit equity labels.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Not an equity measure.
Not an equity measure; full balance sheet total.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to parent company shareholders

variables.notes: Selected parent equity to avoid double counting non-controlling interests.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit, not the balance sheet minority equity balance.
Income statement allocation of profit, not the balance sheet minority equity balance.
Income statement OCI/allocation row, not the balance sheet minority equity balance.
Best balance sheet line for minority/non-controlling interest.
Equivalent balance sheet label, valid fallback.
